Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level Japanese language course, directly contributing to tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fostering relevant skills (Target 4.4) and cultural understanding (Target 4.7). Model B's original reasoning, adopted by Model A's revision, is more comprehensive.
